unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: find out more about the way of life in different places around the world.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：a round (一个圆圈) 绕着 world (世界) 跑，就是去‘世界各地’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What are you doing right now?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：Right (正确的/就在这里) + Now (现在)，强调‘就是现在’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: riding a bike
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：‘来得’快。骑车总是比走路‘来得’快。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What are you doing at the moment?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：mo- (move 移动) + -ment (名词后缀)，时间移动的一个小点就是‘时刻’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What are you doing at the moment?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 固定搭配：在这个 (the) 瞬间 (moment)，指的就是‘此刻’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'd love to, but I'm working on something important.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形象记忆：在 (on) 某件事上面工作 (work)，就是在‘从事/忙于’它。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Are you making them for the Dragon Boat Festival?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拆分记忆：drag (拖曳) + on (在...上)，龙在云端‘拖曳’而行。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Are you making them for the Dragon Boat Festival?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：Feast (宴会) 的变体，有宴会的地方就是‘节日’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hold on. Here's Mum.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作记忆：Hold (抓住) + On (不放)，抓住电话线不放，就是‘别挂断’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's great to hear your voice!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 比较记忆：Sound 指任何声音，Voice 专指人的‘嗓音’（有V的人类嗓音）。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: watching dragon boat races on TV.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形象记忆：R 像跑动的人，Race 就是大家一起跑的‘比赛’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Bye, darling!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词源记忆：Dear (亲爱的) + -ling (小)，就是‘亲爱的小宝贝’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: When you call somebody
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词：Some (一些/某个) + Body (身体/人)，即‘某个人’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Could I speak to ...?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 语气对比：Can 的过去式，但在电话中表示‘更委婉的请求’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Can I take a message?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：‘买手机’。买手机是为了发 message (信息)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What are the boys kicking?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作记忆：K 像一条伸出去‘踢’的腿。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She is taking an online class in her room.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：On (在...上) + Line (线/网线)，连在线上就是‘在线’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's a kind of shuttlecock.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：Shuttle (穿梭) + Cock (公鸡/羽毛)，在网间穿梭的羽毛球。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My uncle is showing us all the sights.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：与 see 有关。眼睛能看到 (see) 的美丽东西就是 sight (名胜)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I know it's near your exams.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 缩写记忆：Examination 的缩写，ex- (出/结果) + -am (我是)，考试测出‘我是谁’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I hope it all goes well!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：‘好铺’。希望能有一条‘好铺’的成功之路。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm looking forward to seeing you soon!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆：for- (向/前) + -ward (方向)，合起来就是‘向前’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm looking forward to seeing you soon!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形象记忆：目光 (look) 向前 (forward) 看，代表你很‘期待’未来的见面。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Are you skating?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：S 形滑行 + Kate (凯特)，凯特在滑冰。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What is happening in different time zones around the world right now?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：Hap (机会/运气)。偶然发生的事情就是 happen。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What is happening in different time zones...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：Time (时间) + Zone (区域)，划分时间的区域就是‘时区’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some people are rushing to get home from work.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：‘热射’。天气太热被太阳‘射’，所以要赶紧‘冲’回家。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But others are not in a hurry!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：Hurry (快) 就像火 (huo) 一样急，in a hurry 就是‘在急忙中’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Lights are shining brightly across the city
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形象记忆：S 代表 Sun (太阳)，太阳在发光。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Lights are shining brightly across the city
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆：Bright (明亮的) + -ly (副词后缀)，表示‘明亮地’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: and colourful boats are moving slowly
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆：Colour (颜色) + -ful (充满...的)，充满颜色的就是‘色彩鲜艳的’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: colourful boats are moving slowly down the river.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆：Slow (慢) + -ly (副词后缀)，‘缓慢地’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: eating delicious food, such as Chongqing hot pot
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：Such (这样) + As (作为)，作为这样的例子，即‘例如’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: shopping for gifts, such as paintings and bags
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆：Paint (画) + -ing (名词后缀)，画出来的成果就是‘绘画作品’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: in the markets.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：Mark (标记/价格) + et (小地方)，标记价格进行交易的小地方就是‘市场’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: people live side by side with many wonderful animals!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形象记忆：一边 (side) 靠着另一边 (side)，就是‘肩并肩’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Many people are rushing to the subway.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆：Sub- (在下面) + Way (路)，地底下的路就是‘地铁’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Bright yellow taxis are picking up...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：B (太阳的形状) + Right (正确的)，太阳正确地照耀着，很‘明亮’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: picking up and dropping off passengers.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作记忆：Drop (落下) + Off (离开)，让乘客落下去自己离开，就是‘送到某处放下’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: picking up and dropping off passengers.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：Pass (经过) + -en- + -ger (人)，‘路过/经过’这段路的人就是‘乘客’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: jogging, walking, and riding bikes in Central Park.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：Center (中心) 的形容词形式，-al 结尾通常是形容词。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Can you explain why the time is different...?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：Ex- (出) + Plain (平坦/清晰)，把事情变清晰说出来就是‘解释’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Our family are taking part in a boat tour
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：拿走 (take) 一部分 (part) 责任或时间进入 (in) 活动，就是‘参加’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Our family are taking part in a boat tour
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：‘突儿’。突然想去旅游，去突袭一圈儿。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: the morning sunshine is great.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：Sun (太阳) + Shine (发光)，太阳发的光就是‘阳光’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm driving to work today
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：D (Driver 司机) + R (Road 路) + Ive (我)，我在路上当司机‘开车’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: taking a long time because it's rush hour.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：Rush (冲/急) + Hour (小时)，大家都急着冲的小时就是‘高峰期’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Can you explain how it can be daytime in one city...?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词：Day (日子) + Time (时间)，日子里的时间即‘白昼’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We're having a holiday here.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：Holy (神圣的) + Day (日子)，古代神圣的日子就是大家休息的‘假期’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's so powerful!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆：Power (力量) + -ful (充满)，充满力量就是‘强大的’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We're wearing raincoats but are still getting very wet!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合记忆：Rain (雨) + Coat (外套)，下雨穿的外套就是‘雨衣’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: others are sunbathing or playing games on the beach.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：Sun (太阳) + Bath (洗澡)，在阳光里洗澡就是‘日光浴’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's tricky, but I think I'm making good progress.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：Trick (诡计) + -y (形容词)，像诡计一样变化莫测，所以‘难办’。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I think I'm making good progress.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：Pro- (向前) + Gress (走)，向前走就是‘进步’。
